title: monday.listen("itemIds") method does not return subitems
excerpt:
Hi there,

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I am using the monday.listen(“itemIds”) method on a board view to show items that a user is searching for ( and hide other items ).

The api doesn’t return itemIds corresponding to the sub items.

Is this is a bug or expected behavior?

Thank you.
